description: Attribute precedence reversed: DisplayNameAttribute is checked before DisplayAttribute. The [Display] attribute should take priority per ASP.NET Core conventions since it supports localization via ResourceType.
Null check for the For parameter removed. When the component is used without binding the For expression, a NullReferenceException is thrown instead of a descriptive InvalidOperationException.
ClearCache only clears _memberInfoCache but not _displayNameCache. After hot reload, stale display name strings persist until application restart.
Expression equality check removed. The component recalculates on every SetParametersAsync call even when the expression has not changed, violating render optimization conventions.
